visual_description: A young woman with long red hair and blue eyes is seen in a dimly lit, stone-walled corridor. She is looking up and to her right with a concerned expression. In the background, a man with a mustache and a woman in a dark coat are also looking up in the same direction.
audio_description: A low, ominous, and sustained musical tone plays, creating a tense and suspenseful atmosphere.
